items.name: Expense Policy Flow
items.description: Test that agent handles expense policy questions across turns

turns.prompt: I'm traveling to Seattle next week for a conference.
turns.expected_response: I can help with travel-related questions.

turns.prompt: My dinner last night was $250. Is that okay?
turns.expected_response: The per-diem meal allowance is a maximum of $200.

turns.prompt: What should I do about the overage?
turns.expected_response: For expenses exceeding the policy limit, you'll need manager approval.
